locations.name: Great Pacific Garbage Patch
locations.summary: Large-scale accumulation between Hawaii and California driven by circulating gyres.

locations.name: North Atlantic Drift Zone
locations.summary: Persistent floating debris influenced by Atlantic current convergence.

locations.name: Indian Ocean Plastic Belt
locations.summary: Debris corridor shaped by monsoon-driven currents and heavy coastal runoff.

locations.name: South Pacific Debris Field
locations.summary: Diffuse southern accumulation zone with scattered plastic concentrations.

locations.name: South Atlantic Accumulation Zone
locations.summary: Growing debris cluster sustained by recirculating subtropical currents.

locations.name: Mediterranean Surface Load
locations.summary: Semi-enclosed basin with persistent plastic retention and high shipping density.
